description.unified: Deals Physical Damage 12 times to a random enemy.
Summons 5 homing arrows that track enemies. On attack, consumes 1 arrow to deal additional Physical Damage.

Deals Physical Damage to enemies in a line based on their remaining HP and knocks them down. This skill has an additional [800->500] Physical Defense Penetration, and if the target is a boss, deals an additional Physical Damage.

After using a skill or Normal Attack, increases Attack by 24(1+0.3Skill Level) and Critical Hit Chance by [80->100] for [7sec->5 sec]. [Moonlight Arrow] stacks up to 6 times. At maximum stacks, you cannot gain additional [Moonlight Arrow] during the duration, but Normal Attacks fire 3 extra arrows that each deal 143% of Attack Power as Physical Damage.

dark.unified: Has a 50% chance to stun enemies hit for [0.5 sec->0.6 sec].

light.unified: Attack Speed is increased by [5%->8%] per stack.

dark.unified: At the start of battle, Attack is increased by 10%. This Attack increase stacks up to 10 times, and at 10 stacks, damage dealt to bosses is increased by 20%. This effect cannot be dispelled.
Your Critical Hit Chance is reduced by 300, but Critical Damage is increased by [70%->150%].
